summary: Startup Apps can remove login items in-app, and brand icons no longer show a black matte on the Dock, installer, or sidebar.
introduced: Startup Apps actions — Remove from Login, Disable in Settings, and Unload Agent buttons on items flagged Optional or Disable at login
changed: Brand icons — strip black squircle matte from generated app, Dock, and website icons; sidebar uses BrandIcon asset catalog image
Dock icon — AppIconSource.png bundled with the app for transparent dock artwork
Sidebar header — correct full database/checkmark logo beside the DiskWise title
fixed: Installer and Dock icons — no longer show opaque black rounded-square background on dark UI
